docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCES WHEN THE MATTER WAS CALLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER LAM WAS NOT PRESENT THE MATTER WAS CALLED. DEFENDANT BILLY LAW WAS NOT PRESENT WHEN THE MATTER WAS CALLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
